---
title: dot-imports
description: "Discourage dot imports."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** 🔵 `note`

Discourage dot imports. Strider default: no allowed packages.

## Bad

```go
import . "fmt"
Println(message)
```

## Good

```go
import "fmt"
fmt.Println(message)
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only dot-imports`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
